## Description

Please describe your changes here. What problem does this solve? What feature are you adding?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (fixes an issue without changing features)
- [ ] New feature (adds new functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (modifies existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation (updates docs or README)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Code cleanup / refactoring

## Related Issues

Fixes #(issue number) or Relates to #(issue number)

## Testing

Describe how you tested your changes:
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Tested locally with `codemap dashboard`
- [ ] Tested CLI commands: ___
- [ ] Tested on Windows / macOS / Linux

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style
- [ ] All tests pass locally
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or API keys
- [ ] README updated (if needed)
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated (if needed)
- [ ] Self-reviewed my own code

## CI Status

When you open this PR, the CI pipeline will automatically:
- ✅ Check Python syntax
- ✅ Build the package
- ✅ Run test suite
- ✅ Validate critical files
- ✅ Test CLI commands

All checks must pass before merging. Check the "Checks" tab to see the status.

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots if you changed the UI (dashboard colors, buttons, layouts, etc.)

---

**Thank you for contributing!** 🙏
